description: 自然资源审计领域NL2SQL测试集 - 100条

test_cases.question: 2023年全省耕地总面积是多少公顷？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(area_hectare) AS total_arable_land FROM land_use WHERE land_type = '耕地' AND survey_year = 2023

test_cases.question: 列出所有在采矿山的名称和矿种
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT mine_name, mineral_type FROM mineral_resource WHERE mine_status = '在采'

test_cases.question: 目前共有多少座矿山？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM mineral_resource

test_cases.question: 查询杭州市所有类型的土地面积
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT land_type, area_hectare FROM land_use WHERE region_name = '杭州市' AND survey_year = 2023

test_cases.question: 2024年共发生多少宗土地出让交易？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM land_transfer WHERE YEAR(transfer_date) = 2024

test_cases.question: 列出所有国家级生态保护红线区
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT redline_name, redline_type, total_area_hectare FROM eco_redline WHERE protection_level = '国家级'

test_cases.question: 全省水资源的总水量是多少？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(total_volume) AS total_water FROM water_resource

test_cases.question: 查询所有住宅用地出让记录
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT transfer_code, region_name, land_location, area_sqm, transfer_price, transfer_date FROM land_transfer WHERE land_use_type = '住宅'

test_cases.question: 哪个城市的耕地面积最大？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, area_hectare FROM land_use WHERE land_type = '耕地' AND survey_year = 2023 ORDER BY area_hectare DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: 列出所有基本农田
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, area_hectare, quality_grade FROM land_use WHERE is_basic_farmland = 1 AND survey_year = 2023

test_cases.question: 各城市2023年的耕地面积分别是多少？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, SUM(area_hectare) AS total_arable FROM land_use WHERE land_type = '耕地' AND survey_year = 2023 GROUP BY region_name ORDER BY total_arable DESC

test_cases.question: 各矿种有多少座在采矿山？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT mineral_type, COUNT(*) AS mine_count FROM mineral_resource WHERE mine_status = '在采' GROUP BY mineral_type

test_cases.question: 各出让方式的土地出让数量和总金额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT transfer_method, COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(transfer_price) AS total_price FROM land_transfer GROUP BY transfer_method

test_cases.question: 各城市的水资源总量排名
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, SUM(total_volume) AS total_water FROM water_resource GROUP BY region_name ORDER BY total_water DESC

test_cases.question: 各保护级别的生态红线区数量和总面积
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT protection_level, COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(total_area_hectare) AS total_area FROM eco_redline GROUP BY protection_level

test_cases.question: 哪些矿山的实际产量超过了设计产能？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT mine_name, region_name, approved_capacity, actual_output FROM mineral_resource WHERE actual_output > approved_capacity AND mine_status = '在采'

test_cases.question: 查询采矿许可证已过期的矿山
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT mine_name, region_name, license_number, license_end, mine_status FROM mineral_resource WHERE license_end < CURDATE()

test_cases.question: 哪些土地出让合同存在延迟缴款？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT transfer_code, region_name, buyer_name, payment_deadline, actual_payment_date, DATEDIFF(actual_payment_date, payment_deadline) AS delay_days FROM land_transfer WHERE actual_payment_date > payment_deadline

test_cases.question: 查询水资源费征收不足的地区
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, water_source_name, water_fee_collected, water_fee_due, ROUND(water_fee_due - water_fee_collected, 2) AS shortfall FROM water_resource WHERE water_fee_collected < water_fee_due

test_cases.question: 查询检查结果为不合格的生态红线区
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT redline_name, region_name, redline_type, violation_count, violation_area_hectare FROM eco_redline WHERE inspection_result = '不合格'

test_cases.question: 各城市的土地出让总收入
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, SUM(transfer_price) AS total_revenue FROM land_transfer GROUP BY region_name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

test_cases.question: 土地出让溢价率最高的前5宗交易
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT transfer_code, region_name, land_use_type, floor_price, transfer_price, premium_rate FROM land_transfer ORDER BY premium_rate DESC LIMIT 5

test_cases.question: 各种水质等级的水源数量
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT water_quality_level, COUNT(*) AS count FROM water_resource GROUP BY water_quality_level ORDER BY water_quality_level

test_cases.question: 查找闲置超过6个月的土地出让
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT transfer_code, region_name, buyer_name, land_use_type, idle_months FROM land_transfer WHERE idle_months > 6

test_cases.question: 剩余储量最大的5座矿山
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT mine_name, mineral_type, remaining_reserve FROM mineral_resource ORDER BY remaining_reserve DESC LIMIT 5

test_cases.question: 各用途的土地出让面积和金额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT land_use_type, SUM(area_sqm) AS total_area, SUM(transfer_price) AS total_price FROM land_transfer GROUP BY land_use_type

test_cases.question: 查询2024年的拍卖出让记录
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT transfer_code, region_name, land_use_type, area_sqm, transfer_price, buyer_name FROM land_transfer WHERE transfer_method = '拍卖' AND YEAR(transfer_date) = 2024

test_cases.question: 各城市的林地面积
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, area_hectare FROM land_use WHERE land_type = '林地' AND survey_year = 2023 ORDER BY area_hectare DESC

test_cases.question: 哪些矿山缴纳的环境治理保证金低于100万？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT mine_name, region_name, environmental_deposit, mine_status FROM mineral_resource WHERE environmental_deposit < 100 AND mine_status = '在采'

test_cases.question: 查询所有违约的土地出让合同
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT transfer_code, region_name, buyer_name, land_use_type, transfer_price FROM land_transfer WHERE contract_status = '违约'

test_cases.question: 杭州市2022年和2023年耕地面积的变化
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT survey_year, SUM(area_hectare) AS total_arable FROM land_use WHERE region_name = '杭州市' AND land_type = '耕地' GROUP BY survey_year ORDER BY survey_year

test_cases.question: 查询实际产量达到设计产能90%以上的矿山
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT mine_name, mineral_type, approved_capacity, actual_output, ROUND(actual_output / approved_capacity * 100, 2) AS utilization_rate FROM mineral_resource WHERE mine_status = '在采' AND actual_output / approved_capacity >= 0.9

test_cases.question: 各城市的土地出让面积和平均单价
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, SUM(area_sqm) AS total_area, ROUND(SUM(transfer_price) / SUM(area_sqm) * 10000, 2) AS avg_price_per_sqm FROM land_transfer GROUP BY region_name ORDER BY avg_price_per_sqm DESC

test_cases.question: 查询水资源实际使用量超过许可取水量的地区
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, water_source_name, actual_usage, permitted_volume, ROUND((actual_usage - permitted_volume), 2) AS excess FROM water_resource WHERE actual_usage > permitted_volume

test_cases.question: 各城市生态红线区内的违规项目总数和违规面积
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, SUM(violation_count) AS total_violations, SUM(violation_area_hectare) AS total_violation_area FROM eco_redline GROUP BY region_name HAVING total_violations > 0 ORDER BY total_violations DESC

test_cases.question: 查找已关闭或停采但环境治理保证金未用完的矿山
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT mine_name, region_name, mine_status, environmental_deposit, restore_area, mine_area_hectare, ROUND(restore_area / mine_area_hectare * 100, 2) AS restore_rate FROM mineral_resource WHERE mine_status IN ('关闭', '停采') AND restore_area < mine_area_hectare

test_cases.question: 各城市水资源费的应征与实征差额汇总
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, SUM(water_fee_due) AS total_due, SUM(water_fee_collected) AS total_collected, SUM(water_fee_due - water_fee_collected) AS total_shortfall FROM water_resource GROUP BY region_name ORDER BY total_shortfall DESC

test_cases.question: 查询已签合同但未按期开工的土地
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT transfer_code, region_name, buyer_name, planned_start_date, actual_start_date, CASE WHEN actual_start_date IS NULL THEN '未开工' ELSE CONCAT('延迟', DATEDIFF(actual_start_date, planned_start_date), '天') END AS delay_status FROM land_transfer WHERE contract_status = '已签' AND (actual_start_date > planned_start_date OR (actual_start_date IS NULL AND planned_start_date < CURDATE()))

test_cases.question: 各矿种的总设计产能和实际总产量
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT mineral_type, SUM(approved_capacity) AS total_capacity, SUM(actual_output) AS total_output, ROUND(SUM(actual_output) / SUM(approved_capacity) * 100, 2) AS utilization_rate FROM mineral_resource WHERE mine_status = '在采' GROUP BY mineral_type

test_cases.question: 各城市的建设用地占总土地面积的比例
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, SUM(CASE WHEN land_type = '建设用地' THEN area_hectare ELSE 0 END) AS construction_area, SUM(area_hectare) AS total_area, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN land_type = '建设用地' THEN area_hectare ELSE 0 END) / SUM(area_hectare) * 100, 2) AS construction_pct FROM land_use WHERE survey_year = 2023 GROUP BY region_name ORDER BY construction_pct DESC

test_cases.question: 查询水质为IV类及以下的水源
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, water_source_name, water_type, water_quality_level FROM water_resource WHERE water_quality_level IN ('IV', 'V', '劣V')

test_cases.question: 各城市矿山的环境治理保证金总额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, COUNT(*) AS mine_count, SUM(environmental_deposit) AS total_deposit FROM mineral_resource GROUP BY region_name ORDER BY total_deposit DESC

test_cases.question: 单价最高的前5宗住宅用地出让
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT transfer_code, region_name, land_location, area_sqm, transfer_price, ROUND(transfer_price / area_sqm * 10000, 2) AS unit_price FROM land_transfer WHERE land_use_type = '住宅' ORDER BY unit_price DESC LIMIT 5

test_cases.question: 哪些生态红线区核心区面积占比不足30%？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT redline_name, region_name, total_area_hectare, core_area_hectare, ROUND(core_area_hectare / total_area_hectare * 100, 2) AS core_pct FROM eco_redline WHERE core_area_hectare / total_area_hectare < 0.3

test_cases.question: 各红线类型的数量和总面积
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT redline_type, COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(total_area_hectare) AS total_area FROM eco_redline GROUP BY redline_type ORDER BY total_area DESC

test_cases.question: 查找矿区面积大但恢复治理面积低于30%的矿山
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT mine_name, region_name, mine_area_hectare, restore_area, ROUND(restore_area / mine_area_hectare * 100, 2) AS restore_pct FROM mineral_resource WHERE mine_area_hectare > 50 AND restore_area / mine_area_hectare < 0.3

test_cases.question: 各城市各类型土地的面积汇总表
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, land_type, SUM(area_hectare) AS area FROM land_use WHERE survey_year = 2023 GROUP BY region_name, land_type ORDER BY region_name, area DESC

test_cases.question: 各水源类型的水资源量占比
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT water_type, SUM(total_volume) AS type_total, ROUND(SUM(total_volume) / (SELECT SUM(total_volume) FROM water_resource) * 100, 2) AS pct FROM water_resource GROUP BY water_type ORDER BY type_total DESC

test_cases.question: 查询合同状态为未签的土地出让及其金额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT transfer_code, region_name, land_use_type, area_sqm, transfer_price, buyer_name FROM land_transfer WHERE contract_status = '未签'

test_cases.question: 查找水资源使用率超过90%的水源
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, water_source_name, total_volume, actual_usage, ROUND(actual_usage / total_volume * 100, 2) AS usage_rate FROM water_resource WHERE actual_usage / total_volume > 0.9

test_cases.question: 查询金华市的所有矿山信息
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT mine_name, mineral_type, mine_status, actual_output, remaining_reserve FROM mineral_resource WHERE region_name = '金华市'

test_cases.question: 统计各城市的建设用地面积
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, area_hectare FROM land_use WHERE land_type = '建设用地' AND survey_year = 2023 ORDER BY area_hectare DESC

test_cases.question: 有多少个生态保护红线区？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM eco_redline

test_cases.question: 列出所有停采的矿山
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT mine_name, region_name, mineral_type FROM mineral_resource WHERE mine_status = '停采'

test_cases.question: 各城市的矿山数量
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, COUNT(*) AS mine_count FROM mineral_resource GROUP BY region_name ORDER BY mine_count DESC

test_cases.question: 计算各城市矿山恢复治理率
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, SUM(restore_area) AS total_restore, SUM(mine_area_hectare) AS total_mine_area, ROUND(SUM(restore_area) / SUM(mine_area_hectare) * 100, 2) AS restore_rate FROM mineral_resource GROUP BY region_name ORDER BY restore_rate DESC

test_cases.question: 查询所有工业用地出让记录
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT transfer_code, region_name, area_sqm, transfer_price, buyer_name, transfer_date FROM land_transfer WHERE land_use_type = '工业'

test_cases.question: 查询取水量超过分配水量的水源
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, water_source_name, allocated_volume, actual_usage, ROUND(actual_usage - allocated_volume, 2) AS excess FROM water_resource WHERE actual_usage > allocated_volume

test_cases.question: 全省基本农田总面积
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(area_hectare) AS total_basic_farmland FROM land_use WHERE is_basic_farmland = 1 AND survey_year = 2023

test_cases.question: 出让面积最大的3宗土地交易
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT transfer_code, region_name, land_use_type, area_sqm, transfer_price FROM land_transfer ORDER BY area_sqm DESC LIMIT 3

test_cases.question: 查询各城市土地出让中协议出让占比超过30%的城市
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN transfer_method = '协议' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS agreement_count, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN transfer_method = '协议' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) AS agreement_pct FROM land_transfer GROUP BY region_name HAVING agreement_pct > 30

test_cases.question: 各城市各用途的土地出让面积和金额明细
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, land_use_type, COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(area_sqm) AS total_area, SUM(transfer_price) AS total_price, ROUND(AVG(transfer_price / area_sqm * 10000), 2) AS avg_unit_price FROM land_transfer GROUP BY region_name, land_use_type ORDER BY region_name, total_price DESC

test_cases.question: 分析矿山许可证将在未来2年内到期的矿山
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT mine_name, region_name, mineral_type, license_end, DATEDIFF(license_end, CURDATE()) AS remaining_days FROM mineral_resource WHERE mine_status = '在采' AND license_end BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 YEAR) ORDER BY license_end

test_cases.question: 各城市的水资源供需平衡分析
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, SUM(total_volume) AS total_supply, SUM(actual_usage) AS total_demand, SUM(total_volume) - SUM(actual_usage) AS surplus, ROUND(SUM(actual_usage) / SUM(total_volume) * 100, 2) AS utilization_rate FROM water_resource GROUP BY region_name ORDER BY utilization_rate DESC

test_cases.question: 综合分析生态红线区违规情况：列出有违规记录且检查不合格的区域
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, redline_name, redline_type, protection_level, violation_count, violation_area_hectare, inspection_result FROM eco_redline WHERE violation_count > 0 AND inspection_result IN ('不合格', '整改中') ORDER BY violation_count DESC

test_cases.question: 各权属类型的土地面积占比
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT ownership_type, SUM(area_hectare) AS total_area, ROUND(SUM(area_hectare) / (SELECT SUM(area_hectare) FROM land_use WHERE survey_year = 2023) * 100, 2) AS pct FROM land_use WHERE survey_year = 2023 GROUP BY ownership_type

test_cases.question: 查询所有河流类型的水源
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, water_source_name, total_volume, water_quality_level FROM water_resource WHERE water_type = '河流'

test_cases.question: 查找协议出让且溢价率低于15%的工业用地
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT transfer_code, region_name, buyer_name, area_sqm, transfer_price, premium_rate FROM land_transfer WHERE transfer_method = '协议' AND land_use_type = '工业' AND premium_rate < 15

test_cases.question: 查询所有金矿
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT mine_name, region_name, mine_status, remaining_reserve FROM mineral_resource WHERE mineral_type = '金矿'

test_cases.question: 各城市矿山的总产能和实际产量差距
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, SUM(approved_capacity) AS total_capacity, SUM(actual_output) AS total_output, SUM(approved_capacity) - SUM(actual_output) AS idle_capacity FROM mineral_resource WHERE mine_status = '在采' GROUP BY region_name ORDER BY idle_capacity DESC

test_cases.question: 各质量等级的耕地面积分布
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT quality_grade, SUM(area_hectare) AS total_area FROM land_use WHERE land_type = '耕地' AND survey_year = 2023 GROUP BY quality_grade ORDER BY total_area DESC

test_cases.question: 水资源费征收率最低的3个地区
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, water_source_name, water_fee_collected, water_fee_due, ROUND(water_fee_collected / water_fee_due * 100, 2) AS collection_rate FROM water_resource WHERE water_fee_due > 0 ORDER BY collection_rate ASC LIMIT 3

test_cases.question: 查询面积超过5000公顷的生态红线区
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT redline_name, region_name, redline_type, total_area_hectare FROM eco_redline WHERE total_area_hectare > 5000 ORDER BY total_area_hectare DESC

test_cases.question: 土地出让总收入是多少万元？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(transfer_price) AS total_revenue FROM land_transfer

test_cases.question: 查询设计产能超过50万吨但恢复面积不足20公顷的矿山
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT mine_name, region_name, approved_capacity, restore_area, mine_area_hectare FROM mineral_resource WHERE approved_capacity > 50 AND restore_area < 20

test_cases.question: 各水源的取水许可量和实际用量对比
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, water_source_name, permitted_volume, actual_usage, ROUND(actual_usage / permitted_volume * 100, 2) AS usage_rate FROM water_resource ORDER BY usage_rate DESC

test_cases.question: 查询杭州市的生态红线区
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT redline_name, redline_type, total_area_hectare, protection_level, inspection_result FROM eco_redline WHERE region_name = '杭州市'

test_cases.question: 2024年各月的土地出让数量和金额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT MONTH(transfer_date) AS month, COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(transfer_price) AS total_price FROM land_transfer WHERE YEAR(transfer_date) = 2024 GROUP BY MONTH(transfer_date) ORDER BY month

test_cases.question: 查找关闭的矿山
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT mine_name, region_name, mineral_type, license_end, restore_area, mine_area_hectare FROM mineral_resource WHERE mine_status = '关闭'

test_cases.question: 各城市的自然资源综合审计指标：耕地面积、矿山数量、水资源量、生态红线区数
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT lu.region_name, lu.arable_area, IFNULL(mr.mine_count, 0) AS mine_count, IFNULL(wr.total_water, 0) AS total_water, IFNULL(er.redline_count, 0) AS redline_count FROM (SELECT region_name, SUM(area_hectare) AS arable_area FROM land_use WHERE land_type = '耕地' AND survey_year = 2023 GROUP BY region_name) lu LEFT JOIN (SELECT region_name, COUNT(*) AS mine_count FROM mineral_resource GROUP BY region_name) mr ON lu.region_name = mr.region_name LEFT JOIN (SELECT region_name, SUM(total_volume) AS total_water FROM water_resource GROUP BY region_name) wr ON lu.region_name = wr.region_name LEFT JOIN (SELECT region_name, COUNT(*) AS redline_count FROM eco_redline GROUP BY region_name) er ON lu.region_name = er.region_name ORDER BY lu.region_name

test_cases.question: 在采矿山有多少座？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM mineral_resource WHERE mine_status = '在采'

test_cases.question: 各城市土地出让的笔数
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count FROM land_transfer GROUP BY region_name ORDER BY transfer_count DESC

test_cases.question: 查询溢价率超过25%的土地出让
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT transfer_code, region_name, land_use_type, floor_price, transfer_price, premium_rate, buyer_name FROM land_transfer WHERE premium_rate > 25

test_cases.question: 查询宁波市的水资源信息
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT water_source_name, water_type, total_volume, actual_usage, water_quality_level FROM water_resource WHERE region_name = '宁波市'

test_cases.question: 全省矿产资源的总剩余储量按矿种统计
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT mineral_type, SUM(remaining_reserve) AS total_reserve, COUNT(*) AS mine_count FROM mineral_resource GROUP BY mineral_type ORDER BY total_reserve DESC

test_cases.question: 矿区面积最大的矿山
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT mine_name, region_name, mine_area_hectare, mineral_type FROM mineral_resource ORDER BY mine_area_hectare DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: 查找水资源费率低于全省平均水平的地区
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, water_source_name, water_fee_rate FROM water_resource WHERE water_fee_rate < (SELECT AVG(water_fee_rate) FROM water_resource)

test_cases.question: 查询2023年杭州市的水域面积
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT area_hectare FROM land_use WHERE region_name = '杭州市' AND land_type = '水域' AND survey_year = 2023

test_cases.question: 综合排查：列出各城市存在的土地违规问题数量
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, SUM(CASE WHEN idle_months > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS idle_count, SUM(CASE WHEN contract_status = '违约' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS breach_count, SUM(CASE WHEN actual_payment_date > payment_deadline THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late_pay_count, SUM(CASE WHEN contract_status = '未签' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unsigned_count FROM land_transfer GROUP BY region_name HAVING idle_count + breach_count + late_pay_count + unsigned_count > 0

test_cases.question: 各城市的草地面积
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, area_hectare FROM land_use WHERE land_type = '草地' AND survey_year = 2023

test_cases.question: 按出让年份统计土地出让总面积和金额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT YEAR(transfer_date) AS year, COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(area_sqm) AS total_area, SUM(transfer_price) AS total_price FROM land_transfer GROUP BY YEAR(transfer_date) ORDER BY year

test_cases.question: 列出所有水库
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, water_source_name, total_volume, water_quality_level FROM water_resource WHERE water_type = '水库'

test_cases.question: 查询筹建中的矿山
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT mine_name, region_name, mineral_type, approved_capacity, mine_area_hectare FROM mineral_resource WHERE mine_status = '筹建'

test_cases.question: 各城市已分配和未分配水量对比
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, SUM(total_volume) AS total, SUM(allocated_volume) AS allocated, SUM(total_volume - allocated_volume) AS unallocated, ROUND(SUM(allocated_volume) / SUM(total_volume) * 100, 2) AS allocation_rate FROM water_resource GROUP BY region_name ORDER BY allocation_rate DESC

test_cases.question: 查询所有自然保护区
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT redline_name, region_name, total_area_hectare, protection_level, inspection_result FROM eco_redline WHERE redline_type = '自然保护区'

test_cases.question: 生态红线区的违规项目总数
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(violation_count) AS total_violations FROM eco_redline

test_cases.question: 查找环境治理保证金低于全省平均水平的在采矿山
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT mine_name, region_name, environmental_deposit FROM mineral_resource WHERE mine_status = '在采' AND environmental_deposit < (SELECT AVG(environmental_deposit) FROM mineral_resource WHERE mine_status = '在采')

test_cases.question: 各城市的土地利用结构分析：各类型面积及占比
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, land_type, SUM(area_hectare) AS area, ROUND(SUM(area_hectare) / (SELECT SUM(area_hectare) FROM land_use lu2 WHERE lu2.region_name = lu.region_name AND lu2.survey_year = 2023) * 100, 2) AS pct FROM land_use lu WHERE survey_year = 2023 GROUP BY region_name, land_type ORDER BY region_name, area DESC

test_cases.question: 跨领域综合审计：查询存在水质差于III类且有生态红线违规的城市
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT wr.region_name FROM water_resource wr WHERE wr.water_quality_level IN ('IV', 'V', '劣V') AND wr.region_name IN (SELECT region_name FROM eco_redline WHERE violation_count > 0)

test_cases.question: 全省自然资源审计综合报告：耕地总量、矿山在采数、水资源总量、生态红线违规数
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT (SELECT SUM(area_hectare) FROM land_use WHERE land_type = '耕地' AND survey_year = 2023) AS total_arable_hectare, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mineral_resource WHERE mine_status = '在采') AS active_mines, (SELECT SUM(total_volume) FROM water_resource) AS total_water_volume, (SELECT SUM(violation_count) FROM eco_redline) AS total_violations
